transcript.text:
[Gopchang (beef small intestines)]
[27 servings]
[I will take care of that]
[And that's possible?!]
[Let me just show you]
[EZPZ]
[Another one...]
[We're done for today]
[That's what I think]
[Double it]
[What is her limit?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Mapo-gu, Ahyeon-dong
to eat some gopchang I'm excited just thinking about it
I had some gopchang here before
But it was just a little bit

It was really good though
[4th floor of Mapo Centum Slow Square]
[Gopchang Paneun Gogitjip] [Seoul, Mapo-gu]
I had a really good meal here
I keep thinking about it So excited
I remember a dog being here There it is!
Hello doggy
Hello
There's a dog in the yard
Hello
Say hello, don't bark
[But it's Monday!]
Hello!
[What did you have for breakfast...?]
Do you like gopchang too?
Bye

[Let's head inside]
How have you been?
I've been watching your videos and leaving comments
I couldn't forget about the meal I had here last time
[It's an honor]
-Your seat is over there -The same spot!
[Let's sit]
The menu
Their meat is good too, but I've been craving their gopchang So that's all I'm going to eat
Gopchang and a stew
How many servings is the long piece?
About 25 servings
-I'll take that -Lol
I'll bring it out
Thank you
[He'll bring it out...]

This is a lot of food How though?!
This is a first
About 5.3 meters long
This should be about 27 servings
I'm hungry
[It's here]
[Packed]
It's my first time filling the grill up like this
It's about 27 servings
How's this 27 servings?
It's 7-8 meters long before it's cooked
I can't help but to laugh
Looks delicious Cook a little more?
Your mask...
I'm a fan of Seventeen
That's why they gave us a visit here

[Seventeen fans come here to support them]
It smells so good I want to eat already
It just got here yesterday so it's fresh
Thank you
[All ready]
Bon appetit
Take it like this
This is it
It's really soft
Gopchang are hard to bite off
But these bite right off and it's flavorful
Dip a little
It's so good
So tender
So soft
The fillings are squirting out

It's as if it's the gopchang in a stew
He's doing all kinds of reactions in the back
Making weird noises
I can't help it
Look at it drip
It's so moist
Very soft and moist
So good
I can eat it nonstop because it's just so soft
Dip it
It's oozing out
There's a reason why I like eating it like this
If you cut it, the insides fall out But this way, everything is kept inside
It prevents all of that
[Plum juice from the owner]
This is a cool cup

I was going to order a drink Thank you so much
[Fuel time]
So good
This year's best gopchang
I only got to eat a little back the last time
I could've had 50 servings
I think I can do that today
Scrape the fillings like this
It's so good
This is their cream white kimchi
1 of that
Their side dishes are good too
Let's cut it this time
Look at the fillings
It's dripping out
Just about this much

Let's stop now
Stay inside!
Why is it so good? They're so soft
We steam them as soon as we get the delivery
So that's why
-Is it a secret? -Yes
We put it in the charcoal oven
If you tell her your secrets, she will open up her gopchang shop
-I will teach you everything -Really?
Let's open one!
These are very juicy
The meat juice is all there It's not water
It's very juicy and moist
You might think it's not healthy
But it's meat juice
Gopchang train

Dip it
What? Forreal?
I can eat 60 servings of this
The wrap is so good
It gives it a refreshing taste And rich flavors too
No, don't drip out!
Put it on top
So yummy
[I won't leave anything behind]
Excuse me,
Can I have 1 more?
Let me check...
Potatoes too, please
These are taking long
Fresh kimchi
God Kimchi?

[It's "omg" here too...]
We don't have this much left,
But we have about 15 servings left
Can you give me the rest?
-Does that mean you can't serve other customers? -That's totally fine
[No, that's not okay]
We can prepare the others for other customers
I'll take whatever you can bring out
[Sold all of today's gopchang]
-Are you not full? -Nope
I'm so jealous
Eating like that is my wish
I like eating, but I can't eat like that And she doesn't gain weight
I gain weight even if I don't eat much
The fillings are coming out
I'm going to scrape it off later

Everything is good, but the fresh kimchi is the best
Let's give it a scrape
This is such a good food ingredient
[No words needed]
The fat
This is packed
Let's eat it as a whole
I ate so fast today
It's so good that I have a headache
Excuse me,
Why?
Do you have soybean stew? Can I have 1?
This is a first for me...
[No way]
First and last time in 20 years
[2nd round]

Thank you Looks great
Looks tasty
[Explosion]
It's a fountain
Can't let it go to waste
Must eat it
There's a lot more in here
1 cow holds about 15~16 meters of gopchang
You had 1 cow's worth
I can eat more than that
[Finished]
Potatoes with gopchang fat
Let's dip it in the filling The one I scooped out
Cut this in half
Soy sauce too
With white kimchi

[Just laughter...]
Our restaurant's record was 4 people eating 25 servings
No one will beat her record ever
[What's up?]
That lady is eating a lot of gopchang
[Scary lady...]
I've never had gopchang with wasabi before
Is this too much?
How did I not think about this before?
This is crazy This year's best combo
This is like experiencing a whole new world of food
Personally, that's how I feel about this
[The stew is here]
[Soybean stew as a palate cleanser]
This is amazing
The "chewy meat"? here is really good too

I want some of that too
The best
Put the gopchang on top of the white kimchi
3 of that
And a lot of wasabi
Wrap it
How about with some stew?
Everything is good
Cut it one more time
Don't drip out
Can't waste this
[She's scraping that too?]
[Clean]
It's really good
Still...
Do you serve fried rice on this too?

[They make fried rice in the kitchen]
I feel like it would be good on here
Look at this
[It's like sesame sauce]
Did you eat all of that?!
[Gasp...]
I can eat another 25 meters of it right now
1 last bite
Will this be good too?
[Gopchang stew...?]
Savory
[Gopchang addict]
[Finishing up the stew...]
Is she hiding the food somewhere?
I'm still not full...
Thanks everyone [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
